charge_plan.detected_windows: Grid charging is planned because low-price windows were detected.
charge_plan.scheduled_windows: Grid charging was scheduled for favorable price windows.

charging.title: Battery charging from grid
charging.detail: A planned low-price charging window is active right now.

optimizer_disabled.title: Optimizer is disabled
optimizer_disabled.detail: Live measurements may still be visible, but the optimization plan is not currently being executed.

supplying_house.title: Battery is supplying the house
supplying_house.detail: Stored energy is being used to avoid expensive grid consumption.

holding.title: Battery is waiting for solar or later use
holding.detail: The battery is being held in standby and is not actively charging from the grid.

idle.title: Battery is waiting
idle.detail_with_next_charge: No action is needed right now; the next charging window is already scheduled.
idle.detail_without_plan: No grid charging or discharge is currently scheduled.

current_reason.active_charge: The current electricity price is inside a planned low-price charging window.
current_reason.active_discharge: This time was classified as expensive, so stored energy is used first.
current_reason.optimizer_disabled: The optimizer is disabled. Existing charge and discharge plans are not currently being applied.
current_reason.waiting_for_later_cheap_slots: There are cheaper price windows later in the day, so the optimizer is waiting now.
current_reason.no_economic_window: No economically useful grid-charging window was found at the moment.

optimizer_disabled.title: Plan is paused
optimizer_disabled.detail_with_plan: A calculated plan exists, but it will only be executed again after the optimizer is re-enabled.
optimizer_disabled.detail_without_plan: There is currently no active charge or discharge plan.

next_charge_window.title: Next charging window
next_charge_window.detail: The next grid-charging phase starts when the favorable price window begins.

next_expensive_window.planned_windows_note: Here you can see when the optimizer deliberately schedules low-cost energy into storage.
next_expensive_window.title: Next expensive phase
next_expensive_window.detail: Then the battery will be reserved for household consumption.

none.title: No further event planned
none.expensive_times_note: These phases are economical enough to use stored energy deliberately for house consumption.
none.detail: There is currently no additional charging or discharge window in the plan.

default.title: House is being supplied directly from the grid
default.detail: There is currently no active battery flow.

solar_charging.title: Solar is charging the battery
solar_charging.detail: Solar production is currently being shifted into the battery.
solar_charging.detail_exporting: There is solar surplus available and the battery is absorbing part of it.

grid_charging.title: Grid is charging the battery
grid_charging.detail: Current grid import includes active battery charging from the planned charging window.

solar_and_battery_support.title: Solar and battery are supplying the house

battery_support.title: Battery is supplying the house
battery_support.detail: Stored energy is reducing or replacing grid import.
battery_support.detail_importing: The battery covers part of the load and the remaining demand still comes from the grid.

solar_export.title: Solar supplies the house and exports surplus
solar_export.detail: There is currently more solar power available than the house and battery can absorb.

solar_and_grid.title: House uses solar and grid
solar_and_grid.detail: Solar is active but currently does not cover the full consumption.

solar_only.title: Solar supplies the house
solar_only.detail: Current household consumption is mostly covered directly by solar.

holding_from_grid.title: Battery is waiting while the house uses grid power
holding_from_grid.detail: The battery is being held back and not released for supply.

optimizer_disabled.title: No live measurements available
optimizer_disabled.detail: The optimizer is disabled. There are currently no fresh live measurements for the energy flow.

device_list.empty_detail: Add an Energy Optimizer device to view its optimization data.

summary.unavailable: An explanatory dashboard summary is not available for this device yet.
summary.capacity_line: Charging headroom to target SoC: {capacity} kWh
summary.capacity_line_paused: Charging headroom to target SoC from the last plan: {capacity} kWh
summary.no_capacity_available: No charging headroom up to the target SoC
summary.above_target_line: Battery is already {delta}% above the target. This energy remains available as a discharge buffer.
summary.energy_flow_no_measurements: No live measurements are available yet.
summary.plan_paused_note: The optimizer is disabled. Calculated plans are currently informational only.
summary.forecast_paused_subtext: This is the last calculated forecast and is currently informational only.
summary.live_flow_when_paused: This energy flow describes only the live system state, not active optimizer control.
summary.today_forecast_subtext: Estimated optimization impact for the current plan.
summary.today_forecast_until_subtext: Estimated optimization impact for the current plan until {time}.

planned_grid_charge.title: Planned Grid Charging
planned_grid_charge.detail: Yellow highlights windows where the optimizer actively schedules grid charging.
planned_grid_charge.detail_paused: Yellow highlights calculated grid-charging windows. While the optimizer is disabled, they are informational only.

planned_solar_charge.title: Planned Solar Charging
planned_solar_charge.detail: Green highlights windows where the optimizer schedules solar charging.
planned_solar_charge.detail_paused: Green highlights calculated solar-charging windows. While the optimizer is disabled, they are informational only.

planned_mixed_charge.title: Planned Mixed Charging
planned_mixed_charge.detail: Two-color bars mark windows with a planned mix of grid and solar charging.
planned_mixed_charge.detail_paused: Two-color bars mark calculated mixed-charge windows with grid and solar shares. While the optimizer is disabled, they are informational only.

expensive_use.title: Expensive Consumption Time
expensive_use.detail: Red marks hours where battery usage is especially valuable.
expensive_use.detail_paused: Red marks calculated expensive phases. This control is currently paused.

cheap_window.title: Cheap Price Window
cheap_window.detail: Blue shows low prices without an active charging plan.

normal_window.title: Normal Price Window
normal_window.detail: Gray stands for all price windows without a special marker.

average.title: Average Price
average.detail: The dashed line shows the average across all displayed prices.

timeline.no_plan: There is no optimization plan for charging or battery usage yet.
timeline.optimizer_paused_note: The following plan values come from the last calculation and are not currently being executed automatically.
timeline.battery_and_costs_note: The most important storage and cost figures for the current optimization plan.
timeline.stored_energy_subtext: Currently available in storage and usable by the plan.
timeline.target_reached_warning: ⚠ Battery is already at the target
timeline.free_capacity_subtext: This energy could still be scheduled by the optimizer up to the target SoC.
timeline.free_capacity_zero_subtext: No further charging is currently planned within the target window.
timeline.mixed_subtitle: Partially measured: {tracked} kWh known, {unknown} kWh estimated at {unknownPrice} €/kWh.
timeline.estimated_subtitle: ⚠ The origin of the battery charge is not fully known yet.
timeline.measured_subtitle: ✅ Based on recorded charge and discharge events.
timeline.no_data_info: ℹ️ Cost tracking starts as soon as charging events are recorded for the first time.
timeline.planned_avg_charge_price_info: This value is based on the planned mix of grid and solar charging.
timeline.planned_windows_note: Here you can see when the optimizer deliberately schedules low-cost energy into storage.
timeline.no_grid_charging_planned: There is currently no grid charging planned. If energy is missing, the house will be supplied directly from the grid.
timeline.expensive_times_note: These phases are economical enough to deliberately use stored energy for house consumption.
timeline.no_usable_data: No usable plan or battery data is available yet.
